zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕7.63万震荡，整体仍处于均线下方运行，短线趋势偏弱但未出现单边下跌，市场进入整理阶段，方向等待突破确认，整体观望为主，等待放量选择方向

MACD持续处于零轴下方并维持负值扩散，空头动能占优；价格跌破20日均线后反复测试未能有效站回，说明上方压力较强，短期仍偏弱势运行

下方支撑关注76000及76081附近，一旦跌破或将进一步下探；上方阻力位于76800与77000区域，需放量突破确认，为关键区间

操作上建议以区间震荡思路为主，未突破77000前避免追多，短线可在76000附近尝试低吸，高位出现放量回落需及时止损

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin remains under mild short-term pressure after slipping below the 20-day moving average near 76,821, indicating fading bullish momentum. Price action around 76,300 shows consolidation rather than panic selling, but the inability to reclaim higher intraday levels suggests buyers are becoming cautious. The narrow trading range between 76,081 and 76,604 reflects indecision, with market participants waiting for a stronger catalyst before establishing directional conviction.

Momentum indicators lean moderately bearish. The MACD reading at -107.37 signals weakening upside momentum and hints that sellers still hold a slight advantage in the near term. Although the RSI value is unavailable, current price structure and declining momentum suggest neutral-to-soft conditions rather than deeply oversold territory. Trading below the SMA(20) further reinforces the idea that the market may continue correcting unless Bitcoin quickly reclaims resistance above the moving average.

Key support is forming around 76,000, with a deeper downside cushion near 75,500 if bearish momentum accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 76,800, closely aligned with the SMA(20), while a stronger breakout zone sits around 77,500. A decisive move above resistance could restore bullish sentiment and reopen the path toward recent highs. Conversely, a sustained break below support may invite additional liquidation pressure and short-term volatility.

Traders may prefer a cautious stance until clearer confirmation emerges. Short-term participants could look for rebound opportunities only if price stabilizes above 76,000 with improving momentum signals. Aggressive bullish entries before confirmation may carry elevated risk given the negative MACD structure. Meanwhile, swing traders may benefit from waiting for either a breakout above 76,800 or a retracement toward lower support zones to improve risk-to-reward positioning.
